name: salesflare
description: Reads Salesflare accounts, contacts, opportunities, users, tags, tasks, workflows, groups, stages, pipelines, persons, currencies, custom-field types, and email data sources, and writes CRM lifecycle mutations, through the Salesflare REST API.

risk.read: external Salesflare API read of CRM account, contact, opportunity, task, workflow, and reference data
risk.approval: required for update/delete actions; create_* actions on accounts/contacts/opportunities/tags/tasks/meetings/calls/internal notes are low-risk and do not require approval; delete_* actions are destructive and irreversible
